text.title: Vector Databases — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 10M-vector Qdrant multi-tenant on-prem with payload filter + hybrid search.

example.title: vector-db.yaml for multi-tenant support-KB
example.code: kind: qdrant connection: host: qdrant.internal port: 6333 tls: true collection: name: support-kb dim: 1024 metric: cosine embedding_model: name: voyage-3-large version: "2026-04" multi_tenant: enabled: true filter_field: tenant_id hybrid_search: enabled: true fusion: rrf weights: {vector: 0.65, bm25: 0.35} backup: schedule_cron: "0 3 * * *" retention_days: 30 destination: s3://prod-backups/qdrant-snapshots/
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (Qdrant for self-host + filtered), r2 (embedding model pinned), r3 (tenant_id filter), r4 (hybrid enabled), r5 (cosine matches Voyage-3).
